title: August 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 31''' is the 243rd day of the year (244th in leap years), with 122 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Diane Polley]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Jack Thompson]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Steve Perry]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Dee Bradley Baker]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Mark Lewis Jones]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[G. Willow Wilson]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 11|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 11]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 115|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 115]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Mimi Ndiweni]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Shawn Valdez (real person)|Shawn Valdez]] dies.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars Insider 39|''Star Wars Insider'' 39]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted in trade paperback format.
*[[2005]] – [[Michael Sheard]] dies.
*[[2006]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 6 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Chewbacca and the Slavers of the Shadowlands]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Stan Goldberg]] dies.
*[[2016]] – [[Han Solo 3|''Han Solo'' 3]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 22|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 22]] published in Germany.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Rise of the Empire]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'' released.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Mustafar|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Mustafar]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Obi-Wan 4|''Obi-Wan'' 4]] published.
<noinclude>
